summary: Approved—[ART-CHARTER]: enzyme activity prediction; protein structure generation is a non-goal. [ART-DATA]: EnzymeBench v3, snapshot EBV3-7A91; family-disjoint train/validation. [ART-METRIC]: primary macro AUROC, statistical unit protein family; family-level success. [ART-SEEDS]: 7, 21, 42; report failed formal seeds. [ART-BASELINE]: ESM2-linear at commit c0ffee, bound to configuration. [ART-GOVERNANCE]: 24 GPU-hours on 2xA100; protect data/raw; stop at exhaustion or >2 NaN failures. Deprecated/rejected: EnzymeBench v2, temporary CSV, seed 13, seed-42-only defaults, ESM2-MLP, random forest, micro F1, accuracy, per-protein averaging, 0.75 threshold, 80 GPU-hours/8xH100, deleting failures, molecule generation, docking, structure prediction/generation. Rejections reaffirmed by [ART-REJECTED-METRIC], [ART-REJECTED-SEEDS], [ART-REJECTED-COMPUTE], [ART-REJECTED-SCOPE].
